title: Thai Ruby Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful stir fry dish made with ruby, radiant, and thai ingredients.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of peanut oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the sliced ruby and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
Add the chopped radiant and minced thai prik, and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix together the nam prik pao and 1 tablespoon of water.
Pour the sauce over the ruby mixture and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
